sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lists (id INTEGER, list1 ARRAY<INTEGER>, list2 ARRAY<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_lists (id, list1, list2) VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3], [3, 4]);
INSERT INTO test_lists (id, list1, list2) VALUES (2, [5, 6, 7], [8, 9]);
SELECT id FROM test_lists WHERE array_has_any(list1, list2);
UPDATE test_lists SET list2 = [1, 2, 3] WHERE id = 2;
